velomagg_temporal_holdout_clean_spec.interpretation: G_FE on a seen-station temporal hold-out should match G_IMD in the same clean spec (no network state, LSO setup). The match within bootstrap noise confirms LightGBM's per-station categorical handling correctly learns each station's effect during training. The dramatic collapse of G_FE on unseen stations in LSO is therefore not an implementation artefact but the structural property of fixed-effects.
